attributes.description: Fires when `system.memory.utilization` for the `used` state averages above 0.9 (90%) in the lookback window. Reduces to one row per `host.name`.
attributes.name: [System Host Metrics OTel] Memory utilisation above critical threshold

investigation_guide.blob:
## Memory above 90% used (ratio)

1. Check free+inactive in dashboards; swap pressure may follow.
2. Look for OOM or eviction messages in system logs (not in this data stream).
3. Correlates with `system.processes.count` and workload size.

**Tune** Change `0.9` in the ESQL to your critical ratio.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.system.memory.utilization` IS NOT NULL
| WHERE `attributes.state` == "used"
| STATS avg_used_ratio = AVG(`metrics.system.memory.utilization`) BY `host.name`
| WHERE avg_used_ratio > 0.9
| SORT avg_used_ratio DESC
| LIMIT 20
